span.p:
deploy
rsync over SSH + deploy-remote.sh
(migrate, restart, health-check)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
nginx host package
TLS on :443, :80 -> 301 https
serves frontend/dist with SPA fallback
proxies /api to 127.0.0.1:8000

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
produce-backend.service (systemd)
uvicorn, 1 worker, 127.0.0.1:8000
FastAPI + Pydantic + SQLAlchemy
Python 3.14 venv, runs as deploy user

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PostgreSQL 18.4 container
127.0.0.1 only, 5432 default
volume produce_db_data
restart: unless-stopped
